decisions.context: Bulk removal of subject mappings in ClassDetail
decisions.decision: Used sequential Promise.all(removeClassSubject) instead of a new bulk endpoint
decisions.trade_offs: Slightly more network overhead for very large classes, but avoided creating a redundant bulk-specific mapping-only endpoint since counts are typically <10 per class.
